title: bromus pumpellianus var. arcticus
intro: Bromus pumpellianus var. arcticus, also known as Arctic Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Arctic Brome include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
